name: Keep Going
description: Starts one same-session Slack follow-up run when a validator decides the assistant stopped before finishing actionable work.

debug_logs.label: Debug Logs
debug_logs.help: Emit detailed Keep Going runtime logs.

channels.label: Channels
channels.help: Eligible channel ids. This plugin currently supports Slack only.

timeoutMs.label: Continuation Timeout
timeoutMs.help: Maximum runtime for the follow-up agent turn, in milliseconds.

continuationReaction.enabled.label: Continuation Reaction
continuationReaction.enabled.help: Add an eyes reaction to the assistant Slack message when Keep Going wakes the agent.

validator.llm.model.label: Validator Model
validator.llm.model.help: OpenAI model used to decide whether a follow-up run is needed.

validator.llm.systemPrompt.label: Validator System Prompt
validator.llm.systemPrompt.help: Optional override for the built-in continuation validator prompt.

validator.llm.apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
validator.llm.apiKey.help: Inline validator API key override. Prefer environment variables for normal installs.

validator.llm.apiKeyEnv.label: OpenAI API Key Env Var
validator.llm.apiKeyEnv.help: Plugin-specific validator API key env var. When unset, the validator falls back to OPENAI_API_KEY.

debug_logs.description: Emit detailed Keep Going runtime logs.

channels.description: Eligible channel ids. This plugin currently supports Slack only.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum runtime for the follow-up agent turn, in milliseconds.

continuationReaction.description: Optional Slack reaction added when Keep Going wakes the agent.

enabled.description: Add an eyes reaction to the assistant Slack message when Keep Going decides to wake the agent.

userFacingNotice.description: Deprecated compatibility config. Slack notice messages are no longer posted; use continuationReaction.enabled instead.

enabled.description: Deprecated. Used only as a fallback opt-out when continuationReaction.enabled is not configured.

provider.description: Validator provider. Only OpenAI is currently supported.

model.description: OpenAI model used to decide whether a follow-up run is needed.

systemPrompt.description: Optional override for the built-in continuation validator prompt.

apiKey.description: Inline validator API key override. Prefer environment variables for normal installs.

apiKeyEnv.description: Plugin-specific validator API key env var. When unset, the validator falls back to OPENAI_API_KEY.
